Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier, BigDecimalVerifier, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T>, FloatingPointVerifier<T>, IntegerVerifier<T>, NumberVerifier<T>, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>, PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>, SizeVerifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractFloatingPointVerifier, AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, AbstractNumberVerifier, AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp, AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierNoOp, DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatingPointVerifierNoOp, FloatVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierNoOp, LongVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, SizeVerifierImpl, SizeVerifierNoOp
public interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a NumberVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S isMultipleOf​(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S isMultipleOf​(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S isNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is negative.
    S isNotMultipleOf​(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S isNotMultipleOf​(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S isNotNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is not negative.
    S isNotPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is not positive.
    S isNotWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
    S isNotZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is not zero.
    S isPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is positive.
    S isWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
    S isZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is zero.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isNegative

      S isNegative()
      Ensures that the actual value is negative. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not negative

    • isNotNegative

      S isNotNegative()
      Ensures that the actual value is not negative. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is negative

    • isZero

      S isZero()
      Ensures that the actual value is zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not zero

    • isNotZero

      S isNotZero()
      Ensures that the actual value is not zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is zero

    • isPositive

      S isPositive()
      Ensures that the actual value is positive.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not positive

    • isNotPositive

      S isNotPositive()
      Ensures that the actual value is not positive.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is positive

    • isWholeNumber

      S isWholeNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a whole number

    • isNotWholeNumber

      S isNotWholeNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a whole number

    • isMultipleOf

      S isMultipleOf​(T divisor)
      Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a multiple of divisor

    • isMultipleOf

      S isMultipleOf​(T divisor, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      name - the name of the divisor
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a multiple of divisor. If name is empty.

    • isNotMultipleOf

      S isNotMultipleOf​(T divisor)
      Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a multiple of divisor

    • isNotMultipleOf

      S isNotMultipleOf​(T divisor, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      name - the name of the divisor
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a multiple of divisor. If name is empty.
